title: Zen Terminal
excerpt: Command line output reduced to signal: warnings, errors, success states, and nothing else.
content: Zen Terminal is a focused command line layer for reducing noisy output into useful signals.

title: Vibe Scaffold
excerpt: A starting system for jumping from idea to usable interface without drowning in setup work.
content: Vibe Scaffold is an opinionated minimalist boilerplate designed to get out of the way.

title: Text-first CMS
excerpt: A personal publishing backend designed for writing words instead of editing markup.
content: A small content console for publishing posts and product notes from the same data model.
